description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a classic, utilitarian design, featuring a matte black metal slide and frame with visible wear and scuff marks. The grip panels are a dark brown, likely checkered wood or textured polymer, providing a secure hold and adorned with a circular emblem. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, offering ample space for finger placement. The barrel is of standard length, with a clean, unthreaded muzzle and no visible compensators or ports. Subtle engravings and markings are present on the slide, indicating manufacturer and model details. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile.
description: A worn, matte black semi-automatic handgun with brown textured grips and subtle slide engravings. The design is classic, with a rounded trigger guard and a flat magazine base.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the muzzle, showing the circular barrel opening and the front sight post.
description_view_1: The left side reveals the full slide, grip panel with emblem, trigger, and slide markings, highlighting the wear on the metal finish.
description_view_2: A rear view displays the hammer, rear sight, and the top of the slide, emphasizing the alignment of the sights and the back of the grip.
description_view_3: The right side shows the opposite grip panel, slide, and ejection port, mirroring the left but with fewer visible markings.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a dark brown, checkered pattern that provides enhanced traction and a secure hold. It is contoured to fit the hand comfortably, with a slight palm swell and beveled edges. The surface is textured for grip, and a circular emblem is embedded in the center, adding a touch of distinction. The material appears to be either wood or a wood-like polymer, and there are no visible finger grooves or additional embellishments beyond the emblem.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, offering a traditional, protective enclosure for the trigger. It is smooth with no visible texturing or undercuts, and its size allows for comfortable finger access. The design is simple and functional, lacking any squared-off edges or integrated accessory rails.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length with a smooth, unthreaded profile and a clean muzzle. There are no visible ports, compensators, or threading for suppressors. The exterior finish matches the slide, showing some wear and a matte appearance.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide bears subtle white engravings on the left side, including what appears to be a manufacturer logo and model or serial number. These markings are small, located just above the trigger area, and are not highly prominent, blending into the worn finish of the slide.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and unobtrusive profile. There are no extensions, flares, or finger rests visible, and the base appears to be made of the same material as the grip or metal, with no additional texturing or logos.
